response: To pause your subscription, please follow these steps: 1. Click on the profile icon in the top-right corner and select Settings from the dropdown menu. 2. response: I understand that Claude Code has stopped working completely and all requests are failing. To resolve this issue, please ensure that you have a stable internet connection and that your device has enough battery. If you're still experiencing issues, try logging out of your active session using the /logout command, updating Claude Code by running claude update, and then restarting your terminal completely. If you have an ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable set on your system, Claude Code will use this API key for authentication instead of your Claude subscription. For more information, please refer to the article on managing API key environment variables in Claude Code.
justification: The user reports that Claude Code has stopped working completely and all requests are failing. Based on the provided support documentation, this issue can be resolved by ensuring a stable internet connection, sufficient device battery, logging out of the active session, updating Claude Code, and restarting the terminal. The issue may also be related to the use of an ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable. Source: data/claude/claude-code/11145838-using-claude-code-with-your-max-plan.md

response: It seems like you're having trouble with Claude Code and AWS Bedrock. This usually means the localhost callback is blocked. Try using the manual flow instead: copy the URL printed in the terminal, complete login in any browser, then paste the returned code back into the terminal. If you're still facing issues, ensure that `aws sts get-caller-identity` works and `AWS_REGION` is set to a region where your model is enabled.
